caption: Professional soccer players wearing blue jerseys with "Fly Emirates" branding and green shorts are seen on a grassy field in a stadium. Red stadium seating with "Coca-Cola" and "LaLiga" logos is visible in the background. In the sequence, several players are kneeling on the grass, while others stand. A blue graphic overlay featuring the Real Madrid club crest and the word "SUBSCRIBED" appears on the screen, accompanied by a white cursor icon in the shape of a hand. Between the initial and final moments, the players adjust their positions slightly; some shift their weight or change their kneeling posture. The background and on-screen graphics remain constant, while the players' movements provide a subtle sense of motion across the scene.
